reviews.title: Not so good experience during our staying time.
reviews.text: I don't want to leave a bad review to any hotel I stayed but for this hotel I think the management need to take a look in the drainage system which caused a very bad smell in the room every time we took the bath so that we booked for 2 nights but we stayed only 1 night.

reviews.title: Nice stay.
reviews.positives: Swimming pool

reviews.title: Staff were polite, but the environment was not conducive to rest
reviews.text:
I stayed here from 25 Nov–1 Dec 2025 and had a very disappointing experience. The first room I was given had an overwhelming smell of feces, though the staff did move me to a larger room.

Unfortunately, the noise levels were unbearable. On the night of 29 Nov, groups of guests gathered in the hallway from 9–10 PM, then again from 11 PM–1 AM, and resumed early the next morning. The soundproofing was so poor that every conversation and footstep came through clearly. The noise continued until 11 AM on 30 Nov, and I had to leave the hotel early despite having paid through 1 Dec.

Staff were polite, but the environment was not conducive to rest. I cannot recommend this hotel unless major improvements are made.

reviews.title: Super stay - Calm and clean

reviews.title: Above average

reviews.negatives:
La chambre était infectée de moustiques. L'eau ne sortait pas correctement de la tuyauterie dans la salle de bain.
Hotel qui reçoit des grands groupes qui font beaucoup de bruit le soir et le matin très tôt (5h du matin).

reviews.title: Facility a bit run down
reviews.text: Ac twice broken in 3 days stayed, first it was not running at all then only ice cold or hot before it broke down completely. Took over one hour to fix it , don’t ask me how, but since it was our last night we just left it on . Very typical Vietnamese hotel , everything basic but ok , staff friendly, but only one spoke English. I guess they have not many foreigners there coming!

reviews.title: Très bien

reviews.title: Great location with all the convenient amenities
reviews.text: I found the hotel through my brother who lives locally nearby the location. The property is beautifully landscaped with a decent size swimming pool. There are plenty of parking spaces for both cars and motorbikes. There’s also a restaurant located onsite with 24 hours service. I would definitely stay here again in the future.

reviews.title: Parfait pour une nuit de transit à Soc Trang
reviews.positives:
Hôtel à la configuration type môtel américain autour d'une grande piscine.
La chambre était fonctionnelle et était parfaite pour une nuit de transit (ce qui était notre cas).
reviews.negatives: Attention, hôtel excentré du centre et peu de restaurants autour pour manger.

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.title: KS in the center, spacious premises.
reviews.text: The room is spacious, high, and airy. However, it has a strong smell as it seems rarely occupied and not cleaned much. When I reported it, the staff intended to bring in a chemical spray. Later, I discovered that they lit mosquito incense at my room's window. Sigh. The smoke flowed into the room for several hours before I realized it.

reviews.title: Très bien

reviews.title: Nice pool. Great location.
reviews.text: Halls and rooms echo, so a bit loud. If there’s a tour group in the morning expect to wake up early with the commotion if your in a room closer to the road. Pool is huge. Lots of great food a short walk away.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: La piscine la chambre spacieuse le restaurant

reviews.title: Highly cost-effective vacation hotel.
reviews.text:
1. The price is really cheap for a room for four with a swimming pool. The room is also very large, and the living environment is tranquil, with only a road outside so it's hard to get lost. It is also very close to public transportation stations for travel to other cities.  
2. It's difficult to call for a taxi; you have to call a service number to request one. The taxi fare is charged by the meter. The hotel is about 3 kilometers from the city center and costs around 45,000 to 50,000 VND by taxi. Local drivers have limited English skills, so you need to rely on hotel staff for assistance, who are very helpful.  
3. There are a lot of mosquitoes at night, so you need to wear long sleeves and long pants when going out, and be prepared with mosquito repellent.  
4. Besides temples, there aren't many attractions in Phu Quoc, making it a simple vacation destination. The Tien An hotel is a very good choice.

reviews.title: 1 nuit à Soc Trang
reviews.positives:
Gentillesse de la réceptionniste qui nous a réservé un taxi pour visiter plusieurs temples.
Chambre spacieuse et confortable.

reviews.title: Hotel has the lot
reviews.text: This hotel has large rooms, cable TV,  swimming pool and all the amenities you need. Softer than average bed and    great price seals the deal. Only issue is that it is a 30 to 40 minutes walk to the centre of town, or a taxi. Would stay here again.

Nous devions y séjourner une seule nuit mais avons pris une nuit supplémentaire.

reviews.positives: Für eine Nacht völlig ausreichend. Bett hart, aber auch das ging. Wir haben an der Rezeption ein Taxi für früh morgens Richtung Superdong Fähre organisiert, hat perfekt geklappt.

reviews.title: Excellent hotel and good value for the money paid
reviews.text:
This is an Excellent hotel, with really good facilities with a swimming pool set in the nice gardens.
The staff were friendly and efficient and breakfast was good.
The room was large, clean and tidy though there was an issue with the entrance door which was quickly resolved.
I would certainly return there again and recommend it highly.

reviews.text: The hotel was in a good location so it was great for getting around. All staff were friendly and ready to help at any time, and there was no inconvenience during our hotel stay. Also, it is very cost-effective.

reviews.negatives: Hoewel vermeld was dat ze een restaurant hadden, was dit de hele tijd gesloten. We konden zelfs geen broodje bemachtigen, en moesten de stad in om aan wat eten te komen.

reviews.title: Best place to stay at Soc Trang
reviews.text: Khách Sạn rất sạch, nhân viên vui vẻ.  Rất thích khách sạn, sẽ trở lại!

reviews.title: Spacious and airy, enthusiastic staff.
reviews.text:
The hotel has a spacious and airy grounds with plenty of greenery. 
There is ample parking space. 
The staff is enthusiastic and attentive. 
The downside is that the room has quite a few mosquitoes and the toilet has a smell.

reviews.title: Mooi verblijf voor een zeer redelijke prijs
reviews.positives:
De kamer is mooi ingericht en heel erg schoon. Het hele terrein en de tuin waren goed onderhouden en heel schoon. 
Het bed is comfortabel en er is een fijne douche mét douchewand. 
Het zwembad is erg mooi en groot.
Erg aardig dat wij onze was mochten ophangen. De dames van de was waren erg hulpvaardig.
reviews.negatives:
Er was op onze tweede avond een zeer luidruchtig groepje jongeren met harde muziek een feestje bij het zwembad aan het vieren. De receptie ondernam hier geen actie in, want ‘het waren klanten’. Zeer irritant!
De bungalows liggen in de volle zon. Je kunt de hele middag niet op je terras zitten omdat er totaal geen schaduw is.
De bungalows hebben geen stoelen op het terras, waardoor je er ‘s avonds ook niet kunt zitten. 
Het restaurant heeft beperkte menukeuzes: in feite zijn er alleen ontbijtkeuzes die je ook ‘‘s avonds kunt eten.

reviews.title: Clean, quiet and close to town
reviews.text:
Stayed at this hotel for one night before taking the ferry to Con Dao Island. The hotel has a beautiful pool, spacious room and hot water. 

The staff was very nice and helpful in every way. I would stay here again, great value!!

reviews.title: Fijn verblijf met mooi zwembad!
reviews.positives: Mooi zwembad, fijn dat er een restaurant naast zit, kamer was prima.
reviews.negatives: Lichte badkleding kleurt geel door het zwembadwater, een teken dat de waterkwaliteit niet helemaal op orde is. Het eten in het restaurant was wat beperkt.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.negatives: Quá ít tiện nghi, không có tủ và cả máy sấy tóc. Không có ghế ngồi tử tế và bàn (chỉ có loại ghế gỗ nhỏ sơ sài). Không có cà phê và trà lipton miễn phí. Điều hòa 16 độ nhưng không lạnh mấy. Phòng tắm nhỏ.

reviews.title: Highly recommended

Very good value

I can grade 9.9/10

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is centrally located but still quiet, well-equipped, and very clean. The pool was larger than expected and our children had a lot of fun, although it was cleaned on Tuesday morning, so we couldn’t swim. The room was spacious, the bed comfortable, and we slept very well - however, a safe would be practical. The bathroom was big, and it would look even nicer if the baskets for soap and used towels were replaced with wood or stainless steel. Overall, we were very satisfied and would gladly recommend the hotel.

reviews.title: Great hotel no faults
reviews.text: this was a fantastic surprise wasn't expecting too much as the photos on a lot of sites don't always represent what you actually get. This hotel was spot on great staff and very clean rooms and the pictures are a great representation of what you get Kudos to this Hotel.

reviews.title: A+
reviews.text: We stayed in one of the villas and it was absolutely beautiful. The swimming pool was great, and all the staff were really friendly and helpful. We visit Soc Trang every year and are so happy to have found this place—won’t be staying anywhere else from now on.

reviews.title: Perfektní pobyt / Perfect stay
reviews.positives:
Ubytování nás příjemně překvapilo prostorným pokojem, který poskytoval dostatek pohodlí a klidu. Velkým plusem byl krásný bazén – ideální pro relaxaci po dni plném aktivit.
Další výhodou je skvělá kavárna v blízkosti hotelu, kde jsme si mohli vychutnat výbornou kávu a dezerty. Díky tomu byl pobyt ještě příjemnější a pohodlnější.

The accommodation pleasantly surprised us with a spacious room that provided plenty of comfort and peace. A big plus was the beautiful pool - ideal for relaxing after a day full of activities.
Another advantage is a great cafe near the hotel, where we could enjoy delicious coffee and desserts. This made the stay even more pleasant and comfortable.

reviews.title: A place worth living! Close to the center, with amenities around.
reviews.text: A place worth living! Close to the center, with amenities around.

reviews.title: Využili jsme hotel jako zastávku mezi dlouhými přesuny a plnil přesně tuto funkci.

reviews.title: Worth the money
reviews.text: An ideal location when traveling to Soc Trang. The facilities are still very new. The rooms are well-equipped and clean. Beautiful scenery with a fish pond and a swimming pool. Note that the swimming pool is quite deep with three levels: 0.8m, 1.6m, and 1.8m, so be careful when swimming, especially for children. There is a restaurant and a coffee shop on the premises.

reviews.title: Exceptional

The hotel is located on a nice road farway from the center around 2 Km. The hotel has a large campus and parking lot.
The staff are very nice and helful. Some staff can speak English with foreigners

reviews.title: AMAZING
reviews.text:
Strengths:
. New and carefully invested facilities, spacious rooms.
. Clean swimming pool, open all day and night for guests, with security support.
. Convenient and spacious parking area.
. Friendly staff, enthusiastic support.

Weaknesses:
. The swimming pool floor and in front of the rooms are slippery, prone to falls.
. Noise from the vacuum machine if in the room at the end of the hallway.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Good size rooms
reviews.negatives: Food very basic, not ideal for 5 day stay for family

reviews.title: Wonderful
reviews.text: The room is clean, spacious, airy, beautifully decorated, and worth the money, with friendly staff. The hotel has a swimming pool and a cafe, suitable for both relaxation and business trips. If breakfast were included, it would be perfect, but there are quite a few eateries nearby, and since it is close to the center, it is not difficult to find a place for breakfast.

reviews.title: Good and relaxing staying with very helpful staff
reviews.positives: Very good value for money and very well maintained property. Restaurant is good also.

reviews.title: The hotel is very okay.

reviews.negatives: lotus pool of neighbors is not good because there will be a lot mosquitoes  🦟 around and not good for kid when they swim round in hotel

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is clean, with spacious parking, convenient access, suitable for families. The prices are reasonable.

reviews.title: Lovely hotel in Soc Trang that exceeds expectations
reviews.positives:
This hotel exceeded our expectations. Did not expect too much, but was pleasantly surprised by the hotel rooms and pool area.
Rooms were spacious and clean.
Air conditioning excellent
Pools and surrounding gardens were very clean and well maintained. 
The restaurant had excellent food,. We ate there often.  
Good security. 
Nice balcony area outside of our room with alfresco dining area
reviews.negatives:
A bit of a far walk into the centre of town, though a taxi is only a few dollars.  Would have been great if they provided bicycles. 
Tiles around the pool area are very slippery .. quite dangerous for kids.

reviews.text:
Our stay was wonderful!! 
Clean, well located and the staff were always willing to help us in every way, which we really appreciated as foreigners. We felt very cared for and are deeply grateful for all the help and kindness they showed us. 

Cảm ơn !! 

Patri & Artu

reviews.text:
Personnel ne parlant pas anglais.
Équipement vieillissant, douche très archaïque et limité en propreté.
Le staff ne semble pas plus concerné que ça par la satisfaction des clients.

The lady asked 600.000vnd for Vip

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.title: Impeccable
reviews.text: Tout le confort à prix modique ! Et belle piscine. Petit bémol : les interrupteurs sont mal placés, ils faut éteindre la lumière puis revenir à son lit sans se cogner 🙂. Mais c’est un détail ! Je recommande vraiment cet hôtel !

reviews.title: Big rooms and pool
reviews.positives: I loved the hotel rooms and the pool, staff was friendly and location was good.

reviews.title: Très bon rapport qualité prix confort
reviews.text: Chambre spacieuse avec lit King size, frigo, TV, bouilloire, bouteille d’eau. Lit confortable et draps agréables. Sdb spacieuse avec douche italienne et séparation pour ne pas mouiller partout. Pression douche excellente et bien chaude. Pas de café, seulement du thé. wifi pas terrible. Piscine agréable mais sol hyper glissant (pas anti-dérapant) et échelle en alu très glissante.

reviews.title: Très belle hotel
reviews.text:
Chambre très propre et grande,beau jardin et très belle piscine... bref rien a dire
Allez y en toute confiance

reviews.title: Emplacement, qualité, prix
reviews.text: Thien an hôtel est très bien placé , magnifique piscine et les personnels sont vraiment à l'écoute....

reviews.title: Bon service !
reviews.text: Grande chambre, confortable lits. Je vais revenir la prochaine fois.

reviews.title: The stuff is very lovely
reviews.text: I just stayed for one night but the service at this hotel was very lovely, caring and helpful. They helped me to book my transport to con dao. There is just one thing which i cant recommend - the laundry. It was the most expensive one i have had during my whole trip here in vietnam. It cost more the 6x in comparison to other accommodation.

reviews.title: Kurzer Zwischenstopp in echt süßem Hotel
reviews.text: Wir sind durch eine Busreise erst um 23 Uhr angekommen, würden aber dennoch sehr herzlich begrüßt. Das Zimmer relativ groß und sauber. Zum Frühstück geht man in das angeschlossene Café auch sehr nett. Leider Spirit nur niemand wirklich englisch, allerdings ist es ja auch kein typischer Touristen Ort. Preis Leistung auf jeden Fall super!

reviews.title: Luxus für kleines Geld
reviews.text: Ich habe hier einen luxuriösen Hotelanlagentag für kleines Geld verbracht.

reviews.title: Alles wie beschrieben
reviews.text:
Ich war nur für eine kurze Nacht da, auf dem Weg nach Con Dao; alles war wie beschrieben.
Besonders hervorheben möchte ich aber die tolle Hilfsbereitschaft des jungen Mannes an der Rezeption (dessen Namen ich unangenehmer Weise nicht weiß): er hat mir alle möglichen Fragen beantwortet und dafür gesorgt, dass mit meiner Weiterreise alles glatt geht. Er hat in jedem Fall fünf Extra-Sterne verdient!

reviews.title: Tự ý huỷ phòng
reviews.text: Trải nghiệm rất tệ vì mình book sẵn trên App, thanh toán 100% nhưng đến nơi KS báo nhận phòng từ 14:00-15:00. Đến 16:00 mình nhận phòng thì KS báo ko có phòng và chuyển mình qua KS khác cách đó 5-6km. Rất thất vọng vì cách làm việc này mặc dù đã được hoàn tiền.

reviews.title: Hotel nên chụp rõ & mỗ tả chi tiết
reviews.text: Mình nhận phòng không như hình đăng trên Agoda, thiết nghĩ hotel nên chụp chi tiết từng phòng để bán trên Agoda để không gây hiểu lầm phiền hà đôi bên! Khách hàng Agoda chỉ biết phòng qua mô tả & hình chụp xem trên Agoda chứ tới nơi mà hotel lại chỉ ra 1 căn phòng khác!

reviews.title: Bra
reviews.text: Bra

reviews.title: Probably the only option
reviews.text:
This was the only hotel that offered a pool. All other options seemed to be high-rise blocks. 
The hotel has a sort of restaurant in front, but it doesn't seem to be part of the same business. That probably doesn't matter much. Food was OK.
The "bar" is a display fridge in the reception area. 
The pool is OK for relaxing.
Bed was comfortable, room was clean. 
Strangely, in the shower room there is an open vent to allow air into the room. It can't be closed. So if the shower room door is open, the air conditioning is working at full power all the time.  That's a waste of expensive electricity!
